retrieved_result: Cottage Cheese Nutrition Facts Cottage Cheese Nutrition Factsby SYLVIE TREMBLAY, MSC Oct. 03, 2017It's a staple in many weight-loss and bodybuilding diets, but cottage cheese should be welcome in almost any meal plan. Each 1-cup serving of cottage cheese provides one-third of your daily dairy food requirement, reports the U. S. D
